review: when it works it's great. However probably 70% of the time it fails to work. between getting caught in a "you have a previous order" cycles (because I bought food last week and seemingly it didnt sync properly) or the app just crashing or freezing on whatever screen I'm on and being unable to do anything. Shame the discounts arent worth the hassle edited. still just as bad, but now with worse offers and extra fees
Did not receive the delivery and no money back don't use this app
always getting message now to contact store and won't accept any payment,
McDelivery is terrible. Mashing the doordash website into your app means nothing works. I'd rather not have my food driven around for 30 min. Never using it again.
